nodes.title: Get User Sidebar Config
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/users/:userId/sidebar. Returns sidebar sections and items with user visibility and order from user_sidebar_config. Requires auth. Returns 200 with array of {sectionId, sectionName, items: [{id, label, route, isVisible, customSortOrder}]}. Returns empty array if no config.

nodes.title: Put User Sidebar Config
nodes.description: PUT /api/businesses/:bizId/users/:userId/sidebar with body {items: [{id, sidebarItemId, isVisible, customSortOrder}]}. Updates user_sidebar_config only. Returns 200 with {success: true}. Does not add or remove sections/items.
